record.bridgyOriginalText:
Just a reminder, as I see so many of them:

High temperatures (even records) in a specific place on a specific day, are not suitable to prove #ClimateChange.

If we argue in that fashion, we give deniers the opportunity to feel themselves confirmed during average or below average seasons ("It's so cold outside! What about this climate change now?")

Long term and wide area statistics are proof enough, we're heading straight forward into the #ClimateCatastropy.
